name: Turkish Coffee Daily
short_description: Run your own Turkish coffeehouse! Take weird orders, wipe messy tables, brew legendary tea. Upgrade your place, deal with grumpy customers, and try not to spill the coffee. One chair, one player, endless drama...
detailed_description:
Turkish Coffee Daily is a single-player simulation game where you take over a traditional Turkish coffee house left behind by your grandfather. As the player, your mission is to run the place and keep it alive.

Missions & Daily Tasks:
In the game, there are several job types. Take customer orders, serve tea and coffee, prepare drinks on the stove, and deliver them to the right tables.
After each successful order, you earn money. You can use this money to buy missing products from the store or buy furniture like tables and chairs from a second store.

There are multiple areas to explore and interact with. Customers behave differently each day.

The game offers around 3–4 hours of single-player content, depending on how long you take to complete side tasks.

Good luck, and enjoy the game!
